svg.text: corrected: sector angles are calculated through φₙ₊₁ = φₙ / ¹²√2 and Φₙ = 2(φₙ − φₙ₊₁)
They follow resonance growth, not 30° division.
A full 12-step cycle returns to the same family.
The inner angular sectors are resonance-weighted.
Generated with DejaVu Sans. Curve is dense resonance path, not straight polyline between note labels.
